parameters.content:
## Twilio WhatsApp Send

Re-import this workflow after every JSON change.

Message field MUST be expression-only:
`={{ $json.whatsappMessage }}`

Never use a Set node with `=text {{ $json.x }}` — that sends literal `=` characters.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { societyId: $json.societyId, flatNumber: $json.flatNumber, phone: $json.phone, messageType: $json.messageType, subject: $json.subject, description: $json.description, amount: $json.amount } }}
